title: Pseudognaphalium pringlei
taxonomy: Pseudognaphalium pringlei is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It belongs to the genus Pseudognaphalium, which is a group of flowering plants. The species pringlei is further classified as a member of the family Asteraceae, and is a part of the order Asterales. This plant is native to Mexico, and its classification reflects its close relationship with other plants in the daisy family. The classification of Pseudognaphalium pringlei is also consistent with its morphology and growth habits, which are typical of plants in the Asteraceae family.
